meta.name: [Important] New Analytics API Supports Data Drill Down & Deprecation of Old Versions

detail.title: [Important] New Analytics API Supports Data Drill Down & Deprecation of Old Versions
detail.content:
# Summary The existing **Analytics APIs** have a **new** version for `202509`, with the primary objective of aligning the data caliber with Seller Center Data Compass. Additionally, 3 new APIs have been added to provide data granularity to help merchants and influencers review, consolidate, and iterate content (video + live) production processes. Details of the new API endpoints and functions are listed below. --- # Impact | Impacted market(s) | * All markets - local and cross-border | | --- | --- | | Impacted version(s) | * 202509 (and later) | ## Important Note Analytic API Versions `202406` and `202409` will be **deprecated** and offline in **April 2026** --- # What's new? All existing Analytics APIs are now available in all markets. These include: | **Endpoint** | **Change Point** | | --- | --- | | [Get Shop Performance](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/get-shop-performance-202509) | **for Version 202509**

1. Align with Seller Center Data Compass data and add more detailed sub-item data (For more details, please refer to the API documentation）
2. Removed the `with_comparison` field, and now developers can make comparisons by themselves

| | [Get Shop LIVE Performance Overview](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/get-shop-live-performance-overview-202509) | | | [Get Shop LIVE Performance List](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/get-shop-live-performance-list-202509) | | | [Get Shop Video Performance List](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/get-shop-video-performance-list-202509) | | | [Get Shop Video Product Performance List](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/get-shop-video-product-performance-list-202509) | | | [Get Shop Video Performance Details](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/get-shop-video-performance-details-202509) | | | [Get Shop Video Performance Overview](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/get-shop-video-performance-overview-202509) | | | [Get Shop Product Performance List](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/get-shop-product-performance-list-202509) | | | [Get Shop Product Performance Detail](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/get-shop-product-performance-detail-202509) | | | [Get Shop SKU Performance](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/get-shop-sku-performance-202509) | | | [Get Shop SKU Performance List](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/get-shop-sku-performance-list-202509) | | ## New Analytics APIs The following endpoints have been newly launched: | **Endpoint** | **Description** | **Version** | | --- | --- | --- | | [Get Shop Performance Per Hour](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/get-shop-performance-per-hour-202510) | Daily performance per hour detail, within 30 days. Including today. | 202510
| | [Get Shop LIVE Performance Per Minutes](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/get-shop-live-performance-per-minutes-202510)
| Get the Live session performance break down to every minute, after the live session is finished.
This API only returns data of live streams hosted by shop official account or marketing account. | | | [Get Shop LIVE Products Performance List](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/get-shop-live-products-performance-list-202512) | Shop related LIVE session (official account & marketing accounts） Sale performance of each product | 202512 |
